heroHeadline: Settlers Kill 14-Year-Old Student at al-Mughayyir School; 11 Palestinians Killed Across Gaza and West Bank
heroSubtitle: Israeli settlers killed a 14-year-old student and a 32-year-old man in an attack on al-Mughayyir Boys School east of Ramallah; seven Palestinians were killed in Gaza including by drone strikes and naval shelling of displaced tents. Cumulative death toll since Oct 7, 2023 reaches 72,553.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
